title: Creation of judicial mortgage
doc_html:
Art. 3300.  Creation of judicial mortgage

A judicial mortgage is created by filing a judgment with the recorder of mortgages.

Acts 1992, No. 1132, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1993.
